column2: # VCF0130: 1=Every week, 2=Almost every week, 3=Once/twice a month, 4=A few times a year, 5=Never, 7=No religious preference
g_weekly <- ggplot(p_weekly, aes(x = period, y = pct, color = party)) +
labs(title = "Weekly / Almost Weekly", x = "", y = "% of group", color = "") +
g_never <- ggplot(p_never, aes(x = period, y = pct, color = party)) +
labs(title = "Rarely / Never", x = "", y = "% of group", color = "") +
top = grid::textGrob("Party Affiliation by Church Attendance Over Time",
